titles.title: He Came a Long Way From Heaven

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I owed a debt I could not pay And it was growing every day But Jesus, paid it all for me; At the cross of calvary, He died for men like you and me, What a Saviour, I love Him, yes I do.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He came a long, long way from heaven, To take away our sin and strife He came along, long way from heaven, To give to us eternal life.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: They crucified the Holy King, But He was not the one to blame, 0 Father, forgive these men, He prayed (said) And to the thief there at His side; He said to him before He died; This day… you'll be with me in paradise. .
